Call log:

per_step.reason: waitFor .sidebar-wrapper (2000ms timeout): selector never visible in any of the 3 runs. Sidebar shell is not rendering — primary judge focus point (sidebar renders instead of blank state) violated.
dispatch RequestFit(paddingPx=24): delivered without error. State snapshot retained roots.loaded=1 and graph.nodes=24 — second focus point (non-empty loaded root set) met mechanically.
wait 300ms: post-fit state snapshot still reports roots.loaded=1, graph.nodes=24 — non-empty loaded root set preserved.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: The flow intent is to confirm the mounted graph shell renders and can execute a viewport fit without crashing. All 3 runs fail on the sidebar render gate (step 1), so there is no mounted shell to fit against. State hydration alone does not constitute a rendered, fit-capable shell. Every run also emits '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' warnings pointing at a renderer-side Select command error that plausibly explains the missing sidebar.

per_step.reason: dispatch Select: returned ok at runner level but renderer rejected it — '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' logged in every run. Selection never captured.
wait 150ms: passive wait step. Failed-Select warnings carry over but wait itself is benign.
press Cmd+N: no selected node to parent from (Select failed); renderer Select still failing; graph.nodes count remains pinned at 24 across all 3 runs — no child created.
wait 700ms: post-settle state still 24 nodes; no child or editor appeared. Focus point (new child/editor created from selected node) unmet.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: Renderer logged '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' on every step in every run. graph.nodes count=24 pinned from Step 1 through Step 4 across all 3 runs — Cmd+N hotkey produced no new child or editor. Both focus points unmet: selection snapshot before hotkey was never captured (Select failed), and no new child/editor appeared in post-step state.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: Mechanical PASS is a false positive. Every step in every run emitted '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}'. graph.nodes count=24 pinned across all 18 step evaluations (6 steps × 3 runs) — Cmd+N produced no new node. No serialized state shows the typed payload 'BF-DBG-210 golden-flow edit'. Neither judge focus point met: editor never became focused after the create-child hotkey, typed content is absent from state, and renderer exceptions were present throughout.

per_step.reason: dispatch Collapse: no collapseSet field in any state snapshot across all 3 runs. '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' logged on every run. First focus point (folder id lands in collapseSet) not observable.
wait 250ms: clean passive sleep — state counts stable, no teardown.

dispatch Expand: no collapseSet field in any state snapshot to confirm folder removed from set. Same renderer-pipeline error on all 3 runs. Second focus point (folder disappears from collapseSet after expand) not observable.
wait 250ms: state counts stable; viewport model not torn down.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: State snapshots capture only roots.loaded count=1 and graph.nodes count=24 — no collapseSet field present in any run, so both judge focus points (folder id in collapseSet after Collapse; folder id absent after Expand) are not directly observable. Additionally, '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' fires in every dispatch step of every run, indicating the live-command pipeline is broken during the window Collapse/Expand dispatches take effect. Mechanical 3/3 PASS downgraded to semantic FAIL.

per_step.reason: dispatch Select primary: accepted at runner level but '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' logged — no selection state captured in snapshot.
wait 120ms: renderer-apply error persists; no primary-only selection visible in state.
dispatch Select secondary (additive): renderer apply failed; no both-selected state captured in snapshot.
wait 120ms: renderer-apply error persists; selection state unchanged from initial (no selection field present in snapshot).
dispatch Deselect primary: renderer apply failed; cannot verify secondary-only collapse because no prior Selects took effect.
wait 200ms: end-state 'secondary only' never demonstrated — selection alignment between renderer and serialized state unverifiable.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: Every step across all 3 runs logged '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}'. State snapshots record only roots.loaded count=1 and graph.nodes count=24 — zero selection field present. Renderer explicitly rejected every Select/Deselect dispatch. Both focus points unmet: selection snapshots never moved from first node to both nodes to secondary only, and renderer-serialized state alignment was never demonstrated. Mechanical 3/3 PASS reflects only that dispatches returned without throwing, not that commands observably took effect.

per_step.reason: dispatch SetPan(x:180, y:-90): no layout.pan field in state snapshot — cannot verify pan value propagated to serialized state. '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' logged (x2).
wait 180ms: benign passive wait — state counts stable.
dispatch SetPan(x:-120, y:140): no layout.pan field in state snapshot; no screenshot evidence of viewport movement provided in run bundle summary. Select dispatch error persists.
wait 180ms: benign passive wait; state counts stable.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: Flow F6 intent is to verify viewport panning propagates to serialized state and visible screenshots. State snapshots expose only roots.loaded count=1 and graph.nodes count=24 — no layout.pan field present in any run. No screenshot evidence of viewport movement provided in run bundle summary. Additionally, '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' fires on every step (x2 per step), violating the 'without console exceptions' clause of first focus point. Mechanical 3/3 PASS is semantically unverified.

per_step.reason: dispatch SetZoom(1.45): no layout.zoom telemetry in state snapshot — zoom value propagation to serialized state unverifiable. First focus point (layout.zoom changes to requested value) not satisfied.
wait 180ms: stable state — no teardown observed.

dispatch RequestFit(paddingPx=32): no viewport bounds or screenshot captured in run evidence — post-fit legibility unverifiable. Second focus point (post-fit screenshots recover legible graph) not satisfied.
wait 250ms: stable state counts; no teardown.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: Flow F7 requires affirmative evidence for zoom value serialization (layout.zoom=1.45) and post-fit viewport legibility. Run evidence only dumps roots.loaded and graph.nodes counts — no layout.zoom value ever emitted, no screenshots or viewport bounds captured in the run bundle. SetZoom and RequestFit dispatches were accepted without error but both focus points are unverifiable. Per rubric: 'A mechanical all-steps-ok is NOT sufficient if the judge focus points are not satisfied.' The Select-related console warnings are unrelated to this flow's pass/fail determination.

per_step.reason: dispatch UnloadRoot: roots.loaded count=1 and graph.nodes count=24 persist identically after dispatch — no state change observed. First focus point (active root disappears from roots.loaded after unload) violated in all 3 runs.
wait 250ms: benign passive wait — state counts stable.
dispatch LoadRoot: cannot validate as reload because prior UnloadRoot had no observable effect; roots.loaded still pinned at 1. Recovery path not exercised — cannot confirm root returns after reload.
wait 1500ms: state counts stable; no teardown during extended settle window.

dispatch RequestFit: no viewport or zoom evidence to confirm fit actually occurred; renderer is in degraded command-application state (persistent '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' warnings). Second focus point (graph shell stays mounted and can fit again) unverified.
wait 250ms: benign passive wait; state counts stable.

judge_verdicts.overall_reason: State evidence contradicts mechanical PASS: roots.loaded count=1 and graph.nodes count=24 persist identically across ALL 6 steps in ALL 3 runs, including immediately after UnloadRoot (Step 1). Dispatch APIs returned ok but state transitions never happened — this is exactly the 'works mechanically, not semantically' case INT-1 was designed to catch. Persistent console warnings '[applyLiveCommandToRenderer] failed: Select {"name":"Error"}' confirm renderer is in a degraded command-application state throughout. RequestFit (Step 5) has no viewport evidence to confirm fit occurred. Both focus points unmet.
